original_image_tags: hand-drawn sketch labeled "drawing 3" depicting a mechanical schematic. The drawing shows a horizontal shaft passing through a central cylindrical housing (outlined with dashed lines for the rear portion). On either side of the housing, there are vertical arms extending outwards, connected by lines (cables) to a vertical support structure on the left. The ends of the arms appear to have looped or weighted attachments.

elements.description: One hand-drawn sketch of a mechanical assembly featuring a central horizontal shaft, a surrounding oval component depicted with dashed lines, two circular rings mounted on a vertical line above and below the shaft, and connecting lines. Labeled with the handwritten text 'drawing 3.' below the sketch.

judge.reason: Both descriptions consistently identify the same hand-drawn sketch labeled 'drawing 3' depicting a mechanical assembly with a central horizontal shaft, surrounding components, and connecting lines, with no contradictions on visual content.
